VJs TV is the global broadcast network for VJ culture, audiovisual performances, and digital visual art. Watch live performances, discover artists, and explore the world of visual performance.

◉ VJ EDUCATION — CH.3 Resources, tutorials & tools
◔
Resolume Arena
The industry standard for VJ performance. Clip-based composition, effects, and MIDI/OSC control for live visual sets.
View Profile →
◕
TouchDesigner
Node-based real-time programming environment for generative visuals, interactive installations, and data-driven performance.
View Profile →
■
MadMapper
Projection mapping software trusted by mapping studios and touring VJs for architectural and object mapping.
View Profile →
◆
VDMX
Mac-native VJ software with deep MIDI mapping, multi-layer compositing, and Syphon/NDI connectivity for live performance.
View Profile →
△
Notch
Real-time 3D and motion graphics for broadcast, live events, and XR — the tool behind some of the world's biggest stage shows.
View Profile →
○
All Technology
Browse the complete VJs TV technology index — hardware, software, protocols, and the tools shaping visual performance globally.
Browse All →
